name: @gitgecko/trace
description: gitgecko trace owner — per-step execution trace recording (G8, 05 §7). TraceStore { record, read, export }. The auditability wedge: users see WHY each finding fired (model, prompt, context, rule, cost, source). CodeRabbit/Greptile cannot answer this (CR-§9.1 W3, GP-§10 wp4).
